subject: Math

lesson.story_mission: Join the Skill World lab to master write, evaluate, and interpret expressions with variables, exponents, and order of operations.
lesson.objective: write, evaluate, and interpret expressions with variables, exponents, and order of operations
lesson.concept_explanation: This mission teaches how to reason about write, evaluate, and interpret expressions with variables, exponents, and order of operations with symbols, models, and steps.
lesson.common_misconception: A common mistake is treating symbols like decoration instead of using their math meaning.
lesson.real_world_connection: These ideas help describe prices, patterns, distances, and changing quantities.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read the structure first, use the model, then check that your answer makes the original statement true.

page_audio.text: Read This Page. This lesson teaches write, evaluate, and interpret expressions with variables, exponents, and order of operations. Math symbols have jobs, so read them in order and connect them to the visual model. Explain why the answer works, not just what the answer is.
page_audio.label: Read This Page

worked_examples.text: Three squared means 3 times 3, not 3 times 2.

page_audio.text: Read This Page. Watch for write, evaluate, and interpret expressions with variables, exponents, and order of operations. Notice the important math language and connect each symbol to what it means. Use the model on the page to explain your thinking before choosing or typing an answer.
page_audio.label: Read This Page

page_audio.text: Read This Page. Demo for write, evaluate, and interpret expressions with variables, exponents, and order of operations. Notice the important math language and connect each symbol to what it means. Use the model on the page to explain your thinking before choosing or typing an answer.
page_audio.label: Read This Page

hint_ladder: Read the symbols and units carefully.
Use the visual model to plan the first step.
Check your result in the original expression, equation, or relationship.

game_theme.mission_intro: A systems station needs your help with write, evaluate, and interpret expressions with variables, exponents, and order of operations.
